title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 25 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 25 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 25 2025
summary:
Main
Iron ore futures fluctuated rangebound today, with the most-traded contract I2605 closing at 778.5, up0.58% from the previous trading day. Traders showed moderate willingness to sell; steel mills purchased as needed. In Shandong, transaction prices for PB fines were 785-792 yuan, basically stable compared to yesterday; in Hebei, transaction prices for PB fines were 803-810 yuan/mt, also basically stable.
